lessonSubtitleText: Test how well you know this story

questions.text: Which prisoner did the crowd ask Pilate to release instead of Jesus?
What did the crowd tell Pilate to do with Jesus?
What does it mean that Jesus was scourged?
answers: He was whipped with a harsh whip
He was pokef with a spear

questions.text: How did the soldiers mock Jesus?
answers: They gave Him a crown of thorns and a robe, then hit him
They made fun of his name

questions.text: What did the soldiers force Simon to do?
How did the crowd mock Jesus?
answers: They told Him to save Himself if He was God’s Son
They pretended to bow down to him

questions.text: What did Jesus say to the criminal who believed in Him?
answers: Today you will be with Me in paradise
I will rescue you from the cross
It's too late to be saved

questions.text: What did Jesus say right before He died?
What amazing things happened as Jesus was dying?
answers: Darkness, an earthquake, and the temple curtain tore
A wild rainstorm flooded the city
Everyone began to believe in him

questions.text: What did the Roman soldier say when he saw Jesus die?
answers: Truly, he was the Son of God
I am glad he is dead
